channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The AI data fabric: Your blueprint for mission-ready intelligence
item.description: Building an AI-ready data fabric requires more than simple integration. It demands systems designed for adaptability, compliance and continuous intelligence. The post The AI data fabric: Your blueprint for mission-ready intelligence first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Meta buys high-profile AI startup Manus
item.description: Meta is now buying the hyped AI startup Manus for about $2 billion, TechCrunch reported. Founded in Singapore by former Chinese entrepreneurs, Manus gained widespread attention after a viral demo video showing an AI agent that could handle everything from job interviews to stock analysis.
item.dc:creator: Computer World
